_meta.source_strategy: Google search by city/sub-trade + direct website fetch verification; excluded fabricators >$50M revenue, public/PE-controlled firms, and oil-services-only operators (NAICS 213112); priority geographies: Houston Ship Channel > Beaumont/Port Arthur > Corpus Christi > DFW > San Antonio > East TX
exclusions_applied: Trinity Industries (Dallas, NYSE: TRN — too large)
Spitzer Industries (700K sq ft, 400K+ tons fabricated — clearly >$50M)
Tex-Fab Inc (multi-location decades of pressure-vessel work — likely >$50M)
Triple-S Steel Holdings (50+ locations across North America — too large)
Public Steel Inc Amarillo (115K sq ft facility — likely >$50M)
Cherokee Industrial Fabricators (sold May 2025 to Hoke Family — recent ownership change disqualifies as 'coasting solo owner')
Anderson Ironworks (located Oreland PA, not TX)
non_negotiables_honored: No fabricated entries — every row has at least one verified live-fetch source URL with timestamp
Estimated employee counts kept within 5-50 employee target where verifiable; flagged when >50

specialty: plate and sheet metal fabrication (laser cutting, bending, rolling, welding, prototyping)
independence_notes: Four-generation, ISO-certified plate and sheet metal fabrication business. Family-operated for 80+ years. No PE / national chain affiliation.

specialty: custom pipe fittings, spools, flanges for petrochemical / refining / offshore

data_sources.field: legal_name, address, year_founded, owners, family_status, specialty

independence_notes: Founded 1969 by Les Coleman. Family-owned and operated across three generations (Les, Larry, L.V. Coleman). Independent of any national chain.

specialty: ornamental iron / architectural metalwork (fences, gates, rails, stairs, grilles, structural steel, gate operators)
independence_notes: Emmott Family-owned since 1957 — 69 years in operation. Premier ornamental iron shop in Houston market. Independent.

specialty: custom steel fabrication, structural welding (AWS certified, City of Houston certified structural steel fabricator)
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated since 1986. AWS-certified welders. City of Houston certified structural steel fabricator. Independent.

specialty: aluminum, stainless, steel fabrication; oilfield skids, sheet metal, custom platforms/railings
independence_notes: Founded 2005 by John King. Locally owned and operated, 35,000 sq ft Cypress facility. AWS-affiliated. Younger than ideal (~20 years), but solo-founder owner age now likely 55-65.

specialty: structural steel fabrication, steel erection, plate fabrication, heavy equipment repair (crane booms)
independence_notes: Founded 1990 by Pablo and Martha Pineiro. Family-owned. Originally Andrew's Boom Repair; expanded to general steel fabrication. Independent.

specialty: structural welding, custom gates/railings, pipe/tube, aluminum/stainless steel, architectural metalwork
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated since 1996. Serves Greater Houston area. Independent.

specialty: welding and fabrication for residential, commercial, industrial
independence_notes: Family-owned. Owner David Currie identified via LinkedIn. Independent. Smaller operation — confirm size during enrichment phase.

specialty: industrial sheet/plate fabrication in steel, stainless, aluminum, exotic alloys (Hastelloy, Inconel, Alloy 20)
independence_notes: Independent, founded 1947. 79 years operating. 40,000+ sq ft on 21 acres. Family-ownership not confirmed on website — verify during enrichment. Specialty in exotic alloys (Hastelloy, Inconel) is high-value niche.

specialty: rolled and welded cylinders (ASME code SEC VIII DIV 1), plate rolling, steel pipe fab for petroleum/petrochemical
independence_notes: Founded 1985 — 41 years operating. ASME-certified rolled cylinders is a defensible niche. Family-ownership not confirmed but independent and small.

specialty: custom structural steel fabrication for refinery, petrochemical, oil & gas
independence_notes: Younger than ideal (~15 yrs). 29,000 sq ft facility. City of Houston certified with in-house AWS CWI. Confirm ownership during enrichment.

specialty: large component structural fabrication, welding, brazing, CNC machining for oilfield and gas turbine
independence_notes: Family-owned operation, 30+ years servicing oilfield and gas turbine industry. Mixed industrial — not oilfield-only.

specialty: structural steel fabrication for petrochemical, oil & gas, power utilities, communications
independence_notes: 50-year-old fabricator with 80,000 sq ft facility, 1,000 tons/month capacity. Self-describes as SBA small business. BORDERLINE on size — verify revenue during enrichment. Independent (not on exclusion list).

specialty: structural steel and decorative metalwork (gates, stairs, rails, steel beams, powder coating)
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated. Over two decades in operation per website. Independent.

specialty: structural steel building erection, PEMB (Pre-Engineered Metal Buildings), commercial / industrial
independence_notes: Founded 1997 — 29 years operating. Independent. Family-status not confirmed; verify during enrichment.

legal_name: South Texas Fabrication and Metal Work
specialty: custom gates, metal staircases, structural steel, ornamental ironwork, residential / commercial
independence_notes: Locally owned and operated. Two locations (Splendora and Houston). Family-status not stated. Verify founding year during enrichment.

specialty: skids, platforms, pipe supports, oilfield equipment repairs (mixed industrial)
independence_notes: Pearland-based, mobile welding + shop fab. Mixed industrial. Smaller scale — confirm year founded and ownership during enrichment.

specialty: sheet metal, plate, light structural fabrication (shearing, forming, rolling, CNC plasma, punching, welding) for petrochem / marine / agriculture
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated since 2001. Located just off I-10. Independent. Strong petrochem corridor positioning.

specialty: pipe & structural steel fabrication for oil and gas; 130K sq ft steel fab + 60K sq ft pipe fab
independence_notes: BORDERLINE on size — 190K sq ft total fabrication footprint suggests >$50M revenue. Verify revenue during enrichment; may exclude if too large.

specialty: industrial pipe, structural steel, pipeline construction
independence_notes: Minority and family-owned, HUB-certified. 13,000 sq ft shop with 4 overhead cranes, 8-acre laydown yard. Independent. Confirm founding year during enrichment.

specialty: structural steel, A.S.M.E coded work, welding
independence_notes: Locally owned. 50+ years of combined staff experience suggests long-standing shop. Verify founding year and individual ownership during enrichment.

specialty: stainless steel custom fab + multi-metal (carbon, aluminum, copper, brass, exotics); water jet cutting, shearing, bending, welding, polishing
independence_notes: Alegria family-managed since 1982 (Jorge → Rick → Danny Alegria, current owner as of 2022). Founded 1960 — 66 years operating. 12,000 sq ft. Independent. Recent ownership transfer to younger Alegria reduces 'coasting' likelihood — watch tier.

specialty: structural steel fab, welding, machining, ASME coded vessels
independence_notes: Founded 1964. Same ownership since 1977 (49 years). 100+ employees may indicate $15-30M revenue — under the $50M cap but at upper end. BORDERLINE size; flag for revenue verification. Independent — Gulf Coast regional leader.

specialty: mobile + shop welding/fabrication, pipe fencing, gates, railings, carports, trailers, heavy equipment repair
independence_notes: Founded 2011 by Ray and Windy Golden. Family-owned. Serves Tarrant/Dallas/Parker/Johnson counties. Independent. Younger company — watch base-rate tier.

specialty: sheet metal fabrication (laser cutting, press brake, MIG/TIG/robotic welding, punch manufacturing)
independence_notes: Founded 1979 by Richard Thrailkill. Run alongside family today. 47 years operating. Independent. Strong base-rate candidate (founder likely 70s+).

specialty: custom metal fab (laser cutting, plasma cutting, CNC machining, welding, forming, assembly)
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated small job shop. Founded 1968 — 58 years operating. Independent. Strong long-tenure candidate.

specialty: structural pieces, stairs, material handling equipment, ornamental ironwork (steel, stainless, aluminum)
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated. ~30 years operating. Woman-owned business (WOSB) certification. TxDOT-approved. Independent.

specialty: precision wire and sinker EDM, welding (incl. precision aluminum TIG), CNC machining, plasma cutting for tool/die, aerospace, oilfield
independence_notes: Three-generation Jackson family business since 1984. 42 years operating. Independent. Strong family-succession profile.

specialty: welding and metal fabrication for residential, commercial, industrial (aircraft parts to handrails)
independence_notes: 45+ years per website. Founded ~1980. Independent. Family-ownership status not stated; verify during enrichment.

specialty: aluminum fabrication and repair, precision metal fab, CNC plasma cutting, laser engraving, welding, machine shop
independence_notes: Locally owned and operated, 25+ years experience. Independent. Smaller shop — verify ownership during enrichment.

specialty: structural, ornamental, and miscellaneous steel work
independence_notes: Family-operated, 35+ years experience. Independent. Smaller shop — verify exact ownership during enrichment.

specialty: hand-forged designs, spiral staircases, gates, handrails, fencing, doors, balconies, window guards, automatic gate systems
independence_notes: Third-generation family business since 1981. 45 years operating. Independent. Strong succession-readiness profile.

specialty: tool and die, CNC and conventional machining, certified welding, precision sheet metal, plastic injection mold work, turnkey fabrication (incl. aerospace)
independence_notes: Founded 1977 — 49 years operating. Independent. Aerospace-certified welding. Ownership not confirmed on website; verify during enrichment.

specialty: custom structural steel and pipe fabrication (3 generations)
independence_notes: Three generations of family ownership in Victoria, TX. Confirmed via web search snippet, but live-fetch returned 403 — re-verify during enrichment per Rule 2 before promoting beyond C-tier.

specialty: machining and fabrication for petrochemical, oilfield, offshore

specialty: metal fab, custom welding, repair, portable welding, commercial construction, ADA handrails, fencing, gates, pergolas
